scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: With more than 2,500 international students from 100+ different countries, Binghamton University is rich with different cultures and perspectives. Binghamton has won eight U.S. national awards for internationalizing the campus and its coursework.
